rationale: The response immediately brakes the pattern, names this as the fourth instance of adding downstream informational overlays across nurse station/front desk/public account/entry page, and prevents the requested entry-page note from becoming the default solution. It allows only a temporary bounded emergency notice, then moves upstream to the repeated guidance/process failure across first visit, second visit, ticketing, and rescheduling, proposing consolidation and structural flow redesign instead of continuing pointwise explanation patches.
